interpretation_hint: Every credentialing program registered in lineage-credentials. Each entry mirrors the program's manifest.json: lineage root, authorized attestors, practice / attestation type catalog, source page URLs (the practice surface), notes. Use this to answer 'what programs does the DAO credential?' / 'what's the lineage for X?' / 'how do you become a Y in this program?'. Fetch manifest_url for the full schema reference per program.

programs.notes: Butterfly Effect is ERA Professionals' youth experiential-learning program (program lead: Bilal; first deployment at Narowal Public School & College, BEC Club Program 2025-2026, signatory Shereen Abdullah). v1 captures self-signed [PRACTICE EVENT] / module-completion records. Authorized attestor chain (Shereen as signing officer) is not yet wired — practice events stand on their own for now. Co-issuer co-brand chrome and printed certificate live in truesight_me/programs/butterfly-effect/ + lineage-engine/scripts/program_assets/butterfly-effect/.

Lineage root + authorized attestors are placeholders. The MVP captures self-signed [PRACTICE EVENT] only. The qualification + attestation chain is unwired until v2 (institution-onboarding) per the design doc.
